C:\mingw64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\msla_interpreter.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\msla_interpreter.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\msla_interpreter.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\msla_interpreter.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o msla_interpreter.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmsla_interpreter.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\msla_interpreter.dir\linkLibs.rsp
